goals_list: nexusctl goals list [--system-id SYSTEM_ID] [--status all|proposed|active|blocked|achieved|deprecated] [--limit N] --output json
goals_create: nexusctl goals create --goal-id GOAL_ID --title TEXT --objective TEXT --risk-class low|medium|high|critical --priority P0|P1|P2|P3 [--system-id SYSTEM_ID] [--success-metric TEXT]... [--constraint TEXT]... [--owner-agent-id AGENT_ID] [--status proposed|active|blocked|achieved|deprecated] [--parent-goal-id GOAL_ID] --output json
goals_update_status: nexusctl goals update-status GOAL_ID --to proposed|active|blocked|achieved|deprecated --reason TEXT --output json
scopes_lease: nexusctl scopes lease --agent-id AGENT_ID --scope SCOPE [--system-id SYSTEM_ID|*] [--resource PATTERN] [--request-id REQUEST_ID] --reason TEXT [--ttl-minutes N] [--approved-by AGENT_ID] --output json
scopes_revoke_lease: nexusctl scopes revoke-lease LEASE_ID --reason TEXT --output json
events: nexusctl events [--target-type TYPE] [--target-id ID] [--limit N] --output json
runtime_tools_check: nexusctl runtime-tools check TOOL_ID [--request-id REQUEST_ID] [--side-effect-level LEVEL] [--human-approved] --output json
capabilities_set_status: nexusctl capabilities set-status CAPABILITY_ID --to planned|available --reason TEXT --output json
request_create: nexusctl request create --objective TEXT --missing-capability TEXT --business-impact TEXT --expected-behavior TEXT --acceptance-criteria TEXT [--acceptance-criteria TEXT]... --risk-class low|medium|high|critical --priority P0|P1|P2|P3 --goal-ref ID --output json
request_list: nexusctl request list [--status STATUS] [--limit N] --output json
request_transition: nexusctl request transition REQUEST_ID --to STATUS_OR_ALIAS --reason TEXT --output json
work_list: nexusctl work list [--status STATUS] [--limit N] --output json
work_plan: nexusctl work plan REQUEST_ID --repo REPO_ID [--branch NAME] [--assign BUILDER_AGENT_ID] [--reviewer REVIEWER_AGENT_ID] [--sanitized-summary TEXT] --output json
work_set_implementation_context: nexusctl work set-implementation-context REQUEST_ID [--context-file PATH] [--component NAME] [--entrypoint PATH]... [--likely-file PATH]... [--do-not-touch PATTERN]... [--interface NAME]... [--acceptance-criteria TEXT]... [--test-command CMD]... [--notes TEXT] --output json
work_assign: nexusctl work assign REQUEST_ID --agent AGENT_ID --output json
work_transition: nexusctl work transition REQUEST_ID --to STATUS_OR_ALIAS --reason TEXT [--override --approved-by AGENT_ID] --output json
work_submit_evidence: nexusctl work submit-evidence REQUEST_ID --kind KIND --summary TEXT [--ref REF] --output json
github_issue_create: nexusctl github issue create REQUEST_ID [--dry-run] [--title TEXT] [--label LABEL]... [--assignee USER]... --output json
github_issue_sync: nexusctl github issue sync REQUEST_ID --output json
github_pr_link: nexusctl github pr link REQUEST_ID --url URL --output json
github_pr_sync: nexusctl github pr sync REQUEST_ID --output json
reviews_list: nexusctl reviews list [--status STATUS] [--limit N] --output json
reviews_submit: nexusctl reviews submit REQUEST_ID --verdict approved|changes-requested|rejected --summary TEXT --output json
